# Must have:*Created: Friday, March 9, 2018 at 8:22:10?AM*<div>Must have:</div>
<ul>
<li>2 Neutrogena blue Face wipes</li>
</ul>

<ul>
<li>Flonase nasal spray</li>
<li>Laundry detergent (must say high efficiency)</li>
<li>Cough drops</li>
<li>Toilet paper</li>
<li>Kleenex</li>
<li>Honey</li>
<li>Grass fed reduced fat Milk</li>
</ul>
